https://github.com/jarro2783/cxxopts.note: Upstream Bazel exposes a library and fuzz target, but no normal test target for the matrix's four test columns.

https://github.com/p-ranav/argparse.note: Upstream Bazel exposes a header-only library target, but no normal test target for the matrix's four test columns.

https://github.com/gabime/spdlog.note: BCR spdlog 1.17.0 exposes @spdlog//:spdlog_test, but that target depends on @catch2 declared as a dev_dependency, so it is not visible when spdlog is consumed through the matrix's BCR wrapper module.

https://github.com/eclipse-iceoryx/iceor.note: BCR iceoryx 2.95.4 exposes real upstream tests, but //projects/iceoryx/as_is:iceoryx_local_test failed during inner Bazel 9.1.1 analysis because BCR googletest and ncurses still use native cc_library removed by Bazel 9.

https://github.com/tinyobjloader/tinyobj.note: Upstream Bazel exposes a library target, but no normal test target for the matrix's four test columns.

https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.note: BCR imgui 1.92.2 exposes library and example binary targets, and its BCR presubmit only builds @imgui//...; there is no normal upstream Bazel test target for the matrix's four test columns.
